combined_text: fomite "fomite (redirected from Fomites) Also found in: Thesaurus, Medical, Encyclopedia .fo·mite (fō′mīt′)n. An inanimate object or substance that is capable of transmitting infectious organisms fromone individual to another. [Back-formation from New Latin fōmitēs, pl. of Latin fōmes, tinder, from fovēre,
